creator: msa@latt.net
text:
On Wed, Jun 05, 2013 at 10:08:27PM +0300, Alexander Motin wrote:
> Hi.

	Hi!

> It could help if you provided some more information about the issue,
> for example verbose kernel messages recorded in some way. IIRC I've
> tested non-ATA_CAM kernel after 9.1 release, and it worked fine for
> me.

	I can do that.  I'm travelling today, but can get this to you
tomorrow.

> Also could you please describe why do you want to use non-ATA_CAM mode?

	I was just trying to slim down the kernel for embedded device
use.  It's certainly not a /requirement/, however it surprised me to
comment that option out and have the system fail to locate its 
devices and boot.

	If nothing else, if the legacy driver no longer works in some
cases, it would be good to get that documented.

	Thanks,

	--msa
